title: Zero-Gravity Data Engine — MCP Tool Discovery & Tier Migration Scheduler
description: zero_gravity.py implements 4-tier data aging (HOT→WARM→COLD→ARCHIVE) with zstd compression, MinHash deduplication, and content-addressable SHA-256 storage. test_mcp_router_unit.py and test_mcp_autodiscovery.py cluster here. Gap: the tier migration scheduler exists as a method but is not started as a background thread on app startup, and the MCP manifest is generated statically rather than reflecting live registered tools.
missing: Background tier migration: start Zero-Gravity migration_daemon as a threading.Thread on FastAPI startup with configurable interval (default: 1h)
Live MCP manifest: regenerate /api/v1/mcp/manifest dynamically from the set of registered MCP tools so new tools appear without restart
Storage forecasting API: /api/v1/zero-gravity/forecast that projects storage growth per tier over 90 days based on current ingest rate
